data.title: Gold's value surges, adding almost the entire market cap of Bitcoin in a day. Gold outperforms, rising 173% in 5 years compared to Bitcoin's 164%.
data.description: In the past five years, gold has seen a significant increase in value, outperforming Bitcoin. Gold's value has risen by 173%, whereas Bitcoin has only seen a 164% increase during this period.

data.title: Coforge acknowledged as a leader in ISG Provider Lens® 2025 for Consulting and Managed Services; US and UK region; midmarket focus.
data.description: In Greater Noida, India, Coforge has been acknowledged as a leader in the ISG Provider Lens® 2025 report for Multi Public Cloud Services focusing on Consulting and Transformation Services. This recognition showcases Coforge's expertise and capabilities in the industry, solidifying its position as a key player in this sector.

data.title: ETH supply on exchange decreases as price remains steady. The Ethereum network has 3.6M tokens waiting to be staked, with a 63-day forecasted wait.
data.description: The Ethereum network is experiencing a crowded validator entry queue, with a massive 3.6 million tokens awaiting to be staked. It is anticipated that individuals will have to endure a 63-day wait before their tokens can be processed.

data.title: Galderma promotes Restylane as the go-to hyaluronic acid treatment for natural beauty, launching global campaign.
data.description: A campaign titled 'Wake Up To Restylane' has been launched by Galderma (SIX: GALD), a leading player in dermatology. The campaign, targeting a global audience, positions Restylane as a beneficial beauty ally for everyday use. Focused on meeting the rising demand for natural, easily achievable results that enhance facial symmetry and skin quality, the initiative emphasizes Restylane's distinct capability to provide tailored outcomes that harmonize with facial expressions for a fresher appearance and enhanced confidence. Key statistics related to the campaign include references to personalized results (1), authentic effects (6), as well as the improvement of skin quality (12-18).

data.title: Haber recognized by Frost & Sullivan for Industrial AI leadership. San Antonio, Jan. 29, 2026 - Haber awarded 2025 Global Technology Innovation.
data.description: Haber has been recognized for its leadership in AI-driven process control, industrial AI, and measurable industrial performance outcomes. The announcement was made in San Antonio on January 29, 2026. Frost & Sullivan awarded Haber with the 2025 Global Technology Innovation accolade for their achievements.

data.title: Event on Feb 21 in New York to feature Japan's "Shochu" by Kirishima Shuzo and Miyazaki Wagyu Beef.
data.description: One of the leading distillers of "Shochu," Kirishima Shuzo, will be offering its renowned distilled liquor and traditional Japanese dishes, featuring Miyazaki Wagyu "Shabu-shabu." The event will take place in Miyakonojo, Japan, on Saturday, February 21, 2026, as part of a partnership with "JAPAN Fes (*1)." Kirishima Shuzo Co., Ltd. will showcase its signature products at the festival.
